# The Stack: Foundation

- Domain: `swing-speed`
- Session Duration: `~25 min`
- Program: `18 sessions total, ~6 weeks`
- Format: `program`

## Summary

The Foundation is the meat-and-potatoes speed training program. It is designed to ease a beginner into speed training and has consistently delivered gains across golfers with different levels of experience.

## Work

- Use The Stack app to continue the program.
- Spend about 10 minutes on the warmup.
- Complete 3-4 intervals of 4-8 swings at different weights.

## Notes

- This program is commonly repeated.
- The full run takes approximately 6 weeks to complete.
- The session itself is roughly 25 minutes.
